mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS attempted, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS correct FROM user_answer WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT ua.item_type AS problemType, COUNT(*) AS attempted, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ua.is_correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS correct FROM user_answer ua WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY ua.item_type

SELECT TRIM(s.name) AS category, COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ua.is_correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS correct FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN problem p ON ua.item_type = 'OBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = p.id INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY TRIM(s.name)
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM problem) AS objective_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subjective_problems) AS subjective_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM programming_language_problems) AS programming_count

SELECT ua.id, ua.item_type AS problemType, ua.reference_id AS referenceId, p.question, p.answer AS correctAnswer, ua.submitted_answer AS submittedAnswer, ua.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN problem p ON ua.item_type = 'OBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = p.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.is_correct = false UNION ALL SELECT ua.id, ua.item_type AS problemType, ua.reference_id AS referenceId, sp.question, sp.answer AS correctAnswer, ua.submitted_answer AS submittedAnswer, ua.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN subjective_problems sp ON ua.item_type = 'SUBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = sp.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.is_correct = false UNION ALL SELECT ua.id, ua.item_type AS problemType, ua.reference_id AS referenceId, plp.question, plp.answer AS correctAnswer, ua.submitted_answer AS submittedAnswer, ua.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN programming_language_problems plp ON ua.item_type = 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AND ua.reference_id = plp.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.is_correct = false ORDER BY submittedAt DESC
